title: Source logos manifest (ADR-046 + ADR-047 Milestone D)
description: Bill-of-materials masthead block for the public /credits page. One entry per organization or content source whose imagery, text, or both we redistribute. Logos themselves are tracked by image-provenance.json; this manifest records the editorial framing — display name, link, and the credit copy that opens each section on /credits.

id.description: Stable id used to group provenance entries on /credits. Lowercase, hyphenated.

name.description: Public display name (e.g. 'NASA', 'European Space Agency'). Locale overlays may override.

kind.description: What this source is. Used for grouping the credits page sections.

logo_path.description: Served path to the masthead logo (e.g. '/logos/nasa.svg').

license_summary.description: One-line summary of the dominant license terms (e.g. 'Public domain — U.S. Government work', 'Creative Commons CC BY-SA 4.0'). Per-image entries still carry their own license_short.
